userQuery: First date tonight, dinner in SoHo. What's the move?

content: For a first date in SoHo, let's aim for confidence-forward looks that blend sophistication with a touch of edge. We want something that feels elevated yet approachable.

options.title: The Edgy Leather Mix
options.description: Pair a sleek black leather mini skirt with a black mockneck bodysuit. Add knee-high black boots and a structured leather jacket for a look that feels edgy yet polished.

options.title: The Effortless Denim
options.description: Opt for dark wash jeans with a black off-shoulder long sleeve top. Style it with black booties and a small crossbody bag for an effortlessly chic ensemble.

options.title: The Classic Maxi
options.description: Choose a black knit long sleeve maxi dress. Pair it with ankle boots and a sleek clutch to keep the look timeless yet modern.

content: Look 1 is my top pick—it offers a perfect blend of edgy style and polished sophistication, ideal for a first date in the city.
What's the vibe of the restaurant—more casual or upscale?
